message:
fix(planner): correct UPDATE parameter indexing and UTF-8-safe query text truncation

codegen:
- Fixed param_idx tracking for UPDATE codegen: numbered placeholders (?N)
  now correctly advance param_idx so subsequent anonymous ? parameters
  receive the correct index. Previously, a mix of numbered and anonymous
  placeholders could produce incorrect parameter binding.

decision_contract:
- Extracted truncate_query_text_for_contract() function that respects
  UTF-8 char boundaries when truncating long query text
- Ensures truncated text is exactly MAX_QUERY_TEXT_LEN bytes (was
  previously MAX_QUERY_TEXT_LEN + 14 due to appending "...[truncated]"
  after already truncating to the limit)
- Added TRUNCATION_SUFFIX constant for the "...[truncated]" marker
- New test: query_text_truncation_preserves_utf8_boundaries with
  multi-byte characters (3000x "é") verifying no mid-codepoint splits

Updates planner index selection e2e artifact to reflect new behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
